name_it: Saint Christopher Magallanes and companions, martyrs
name_en: Saint Christopher Magallanes and companions, martyrs
name_es: Saint Christopher Magallanes and companions, martyrs
name_pt: Saint Christopher Magallanes and companions, martyrs
bio_en: Cristóbal Magallanes Jara was a Mexican Catholic priest and martyr who was killed without trial on the way to say Mass during the Cristero War. He had faced trumped-up charges of inciting rebellion.
bio_it: Cristóbal Magallanes Jara was a Mexican Catholic priest and martyr who was killed without trial on the way to say Mass during the Cristero War. He had faced trumped-up charges of inciting rebellion.
